Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c2 (seed+2) -- single mossy tree-stump kiosk with a door, bench, and hanging lantern, on a clean near-neutral gradient background (best cutout reliability of the 4). c0 read as a truer 'kiosk' shape but sat inside a busier full forest scene (weaker silhouette for cutout, the same risk flagged on gloomwood-entrance in U6); c1 was a multi-panel concept sheet; c3 had a visible signature-like artifact in two corners.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Prop world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA (windowed Sprite2D + textured PointLight2D pilot scene, deleted before commit, per art/pipeline/README.md) directly swept the light left/right on this asset -- bumps brightened toward the light on both sides, no caved-in/inverted relief. Passed on the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention.
